recommendation_justification: Solid preliminary report; numbers verify (27/27); seven major issues found, none blocking, all fixable in-line; eleven minor issues mostly editorial.

strengths.note: Contamination caveat is front-loaded and unambiguous; explicit non-claim avoids over-interpretation of the DermLIP positive.
Method section now has equations for both linear and MLP regularisation paths after the recent fix; notation is internally consistent.
Nine-experiment arc is structured as a falsification ladder; tables and figures are well-aligned with prose.
Single source of truth for every numeric claim; verifier passes 27/27 at delta 0.0000.
Direction-structure result is now quantified (CLIP gap -0.049, BiomedCLIP gap -0.034, DermLIP gap +0.111) and verified directly against the npz latents at build time.
EXP-009 framed as a candidate follow-up rather than a commitment; decision table commits the outcome interpretation in advance.

weaknesses.problem: Two different natural-image AUROC ranges are quoted (0.25–0.29 vs 0.25–0.33) without scope qualifier.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Re-anchor §6:70 and §G:41 to '0.25–0.33 across natural-image and general-medical pretraining', or unify on 0.25–0.29.

weaknesses.problem: Caption claims '±0.011 band around 0.255' but actual midpoint of {0.249, 0.270, 0.248} is 0.259.
'ViT-B/14--B/16' reads as a range; intended meaning is 'and'.
AUROC, AUPRC, FPR, TPR, SSL are never expanded on first use.
Hard-coded source-file line numbers in published prose are brittle and not in any verification harness.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Drop the explicit line numbers; keep function names.

weaknesses.problem: yan2025derm1m bib title differs from the verified arXiv title.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Replace title with 'Derm1M: A Million-scale Vision-Language Dataset Aligned with Clinical Ontology Knowledge for Dermatology'; expand author list to {Yan, Hu, Jiang, Li, Fei, Tschandl, Kittler, Ge}.

weaknesses.problem: yan2025panderm bib title differs from the verified arXiv title; cite key encodes wrong year (paper is 2024).
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Replace title with 'A Multimodal Vision Foundation Model for Clinical Dermatology'; rename key to yan2024panderm.

weaknesses.problem: image-text/figure-caption uses hyphen but §2 and §H quote use en-dash (--). Inconsistent.
'clearly-scoped' incorrectly hyphenated (-ly adverb takes no hyphen).
'HF' used as acronym before 'Hugging Face' is defined.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: 'Hugging Face Hub' or 'Hugging Face (HF)' on first use.

weaknesses.problem: EXP-001 train shown as 0.999, test as 1.000; both round to 1.000 from raw 0.99985/0.99981.
EXP-007 Δ shown as +0.364 (single-seed) but test cell uses seed-mean (0.944).
'13%' and '3.3%' MSE-reduction numbers not present in any committed metrics file; unverified.
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Either ship jepa_training_report.json or relocate the numbers to locked-numbers.json with a verifier check.

weaknesses.problem: Cosmetic line-broken hyphenated compounds (deterministic-augmentation, dermoscopy-domain, general-medical).
weaknesses.suggested_fix: Will reflow on any later text edit; no manual action needed.

questions.question: Why is the test split fixed to 'strong_held_out_2' and never rotated? Have you considered cycling which family is held out across runs to test robustness of the inversion finding?
Could the +0.111 stable/changing gap under DermLIP be reproduced on a different dermoscopy dataset (e.g. PAD-UFES-20)? That would be a partial partition without requiring EXP-009-scale pretrain.

revision_plan.edit: §6:70 and §G:41 — append 'across natural-image and general-medical pretraining' or unify range.
tab2 caption + §6 prose — '0.255' → '0.259' or rewrite as '[0.248, 0.270]'.
refs.bib — correct yan2025derm1m, yan2025panderm titles + authors.
Replace 'image-text'/'figure-caption' with en-dash form outside quotes.

score_anchors_used: 0–20 unacceptable · 21–40 weak · 41–55 adequate-but-flawed · 56–70 solid · 71–85 strong · 86–92 excellent · 93–100 exceptional. Default expectation: 45–70.
anti_inflation_applied: Citation rigor capped at 64 before fixes due to two title discrepancies (W6, W7); rises to 72 after fix.

failure_modes_checked.result: clean — every numeric claim traces to locked-numbers.json or per-run metrics.json
clean — paper explicitly does not claim domain transfer; HAM10000 contamination caveat is load-bearing
clean — DermLIP-vs-CLIP delta is held against three predictor scaffolds and across architectures
clean — method matches code at file:line pointers
clean — alternate framings (data overlap, scaffold capacity, optimizer, scale) are explicitly considered and dismissed
two title discrepancies (W6, W7); no fully fabricated citation
clean — five-seed sweep on the two contamination-relevant runs
